notes: Additive cross-pillar rules. On Almanac open and on each pillar's boot, any rule whose `when` predicates all hold grants its `grant_token` (once). Granted tokens are read by Almanac entries AND by the pillars themselves — light-touch bonuses, never gates. Predicate shapes match AlmanacState.predicate_met. See lore/_ONEIRONAUTS_ALMANAC_DESIGN.md.

rules.note: Two independent brushes with the 1976 incident (Pirate Summer's shortwave + Sweetgum's island light) traces the thread.
All 22 arcana won. Lights THREAD · The Whole Reading and can be honored by any pillar as a completionist beat.
Reaching the Basilica subfloor drops a piece of intel Community Planned can surface at setup (the county reads the deep places).
Fey Faire mastery (royals reconciled + warren emptied) — a cross-pillar honor token.
Both Earthman readings done — the manuscript and its correction. A VN-facing aside token.
